# ToolCraft — Complete AI Discovery File

## About ToolCraft

ToolCraft is a free online toolkit for image conversion, PDF manipulation,
Markdown editing, and developer utilities. Built with privacy as a core
principle — all processing happens in the user's browser. No files are ever
uploaded to any server.

Domain: https://toolcraftbox.com
Category subdomains:
  - https://image.toolcraftbox.com (Image Tools)
  - https://pdf.toolcraftbox.com (PDF Tools)
  - https://markdown.toolcraftbox.com (Markdown Tools)
  - https://dev.toolcraftbox.com (Developer Tools)

## Image Tools

### HEIC to JPG Converter
URL: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/heic-to-jpg
Converts Apple HEIC images to universally compatible JPEG format. All
conversion happens in the browser using the heic2any library and Canvas
API. No file uploads. Zero server cost.

### WebP to JPG Converter
URL: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/webp-to-jpg
Converts WebP images to JPEG. Browser-based Canvas API conversion. No
uploads required.

### Image Compressor
URL: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/image-compressor
Compress images with adjustable quality (10-100%). Real-time preview of
file size savings. Uses Canvas API for client-side compression.

## PDF Tools

### JPG to PDF Converter
URL: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/jpg-to-pdf
Convert images (JPG/PNG) to PDF. Combine multiple images into a single
PDF document. Page size options: A4, Letter, Legal, A3. Uses pdf-lib.

### PDF to JPG Converter
URL: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/pdf-to-jpg
Extract pages from PDF as high-quality JPEG images. Renders at 2x
resolution for crisp output. Uses pdfjs-dist for client-side rendering.

### Merge PDF Files
URL: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/merge-pdf
Combine multiple PDF files into one document. Arrange files in order.
All merging done in-browser with pdf-lib. No file uploads.

## Markdown Tools

### Online Markdown Editor
URL: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/markdown-editor
Split-view Markdown editor with live preview. Supports GitHub Flavored
Markdown (GFM), code syntax highlighting, tables. Export to HTML.

### Markdown to HTML Converter
URL: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/markdown-to-html
Convert Markdown to clean HTML. Supports GFM including tables, task
lists, strikethrough. Perfect for converting AI chat outputs (ChatGPT,
Claude, Gemini all output Markdown).

### Markdown Table Generator
URL: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/markdown-table-generator
Visual table builder that generates Markdown table syntax. Spreadsheet-
like interface. Supports column alignment (left/center/right).

## Developer Tools

### JSON Formatter & Validator
URL: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/json-formatter
Format, validate, and minify JSON. Tree view for complex structures.
Real-time validation with error highlighting. All browser-based.

### Base64 Encoder / Decoder
URL: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/base64-encode-decode
Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 to text. UTF-8 support. Works
entirely in the browser.

### UUID Generator
URL: https://toolcraftbox.com/tools/uuid-generator
Generate UUID v4 identifiers using cryptographically strong randomness.
Batch generation (1-100). All generated in browser.

## Blog Articles
- How to Convert HEIC to JPG: https://toolcraftbox.com/blog/how-to-convert-heic-to-jpg
- What Is Markdown: https://toolcraftbox.com/blog/what-is-markdown
- How to Compress Images: https://toolcraftbox.com/blog/how-to-compress-images
- How to Merge PDF Files: https://toolcraftbox.com/blog/how-to-merge-pdf-files
- How to Format JSON: https://toolcraftbox.com/blog/how-to-format-json

## Technical Details
- Framework: Next.js 16 with App Router
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui v4
- All tools: client-side processing (zero server cost per use)
- Structured data: JSON-LD (HowTo, FAQPage, SoftwareApplication, BreadcrumbList)
- Deployed: Tencent Cloud Hong Kong
- HTTPS: Let's Encrypt with auto-renewal
